_comment: Per-model USD pricing per million tokens, read by loop-estimate.py. SOURCE OF TRUTH is skills/claude-api-ops/SKILL.md 'Current Models' table — run skills/claude-api-ops/scripts/check-model-table.py --live if you suspect drift. Date-stamp this file when updating.

_pattern_defaults._comment: Rough per-run token estimates by pattern. input = context the run reads (STATE, diffs, tool results); output = tokens the model generates; subagents multiplies tokens when the pattern fans out makers/checkers. Estimates, not guarantees — reconcile against run-log.md actuals.
